html:
works

illustration · MV · event · goods

イラストだけでなく、MVイラストやグッズ制作など 幅広いジャンルの制作を得意としています。

蛍光色とパキッとした
ラインが好き。

人物メインのインパクトのある絵を制作。蛍光色やパッキリとした線、ハードな色面構成を武器に、観た瞬間に「1:09 の絵だ」とわかるスタイルを追求しています。

イラスト一覧へ →

ボカロやCover動画の
MVイラストを描きます。

歌い手・VTuber さんの映像作品用イラストを多数制作。楽曲の世界観に合わせた一枚絵から、サムネイル・ジャケット・アレンジ背景まで幅広く対応します。

MVイラスト一覧へ →

東京でたくさん
活動しています。

デザインフェスタ、コミティア、池袋 Emotions、かわいいは⚪︎⚪︎展、ハマクリなど、東京中心の展示・イベントに多数出展。 会いに行く感覚で来てください。

イベント一覧へ →

オリジナル「もちうさ」
はじめました。

もちっと丸い体に長い耳。 グッズ展開しやすいようにシルエットと色数を整理しているので、ステッカー、アパレル、ぬいぐるみなどいろいろな形に落とし込みやすいキャラです。

for brands of all sizes,

01 / 06 2020

Amanda Braga

Amanda Braga's portfolio is a digital runway — an editorial stage where fashion, motion, and narrative collide. Built as a seamless scroll journey, the site transforms her body of work into a cinematic experience: expressive typography, fluid GSAP interactions, and immersive layouts that feel alive with every swipe. Globally celebrated by Awwwards, FWA, and Flux Academy (2.4M views), it redefines the personal portfolio as more than a showcase — it's a brand experience in motion.

WebsiteFront-End DevWordpress
Launch Project ↗
Editorial · Motion Awwwards · FWA
02 / 06 2025

Credit Genie

Credit Genie partnered with us to transform their new design into a living digital product. Our team translated static layouts into smooth, performant code, layering in subtle animations and thoughtful transitions that elevate the user journey. Beyond the build, we extended the site with new pages and components, ensuring scalability as the brand evolved. The result: a digital presence that feels seamless, dynamic, and true to Credit Genie's mission of empowering financial wellness.

Front-End DevWordpress
Launch Project ↗
Fintech 2025
03 / 06 2025

JCPM Malls

Cappen partnered with Grupo JCPM to reimagine the digital presence of seven of Brazil's leading shopping centers, creating a modular, scalable platform designed around user experience. More than just websites, the project established a living digital ecosystem — one that adapts to millions of visitors while honoring each mall's unique identity. Through deep collaboration, research, and iterative prototyping, we delivered a platform that set a new standard for the sector and earned recognition as one of JCPM's top marketing partners in 2024.

WebsiteUX DesignUI DesignWeb Dev
Launch Project ↗
Ecosystem · 7 Malls 2024 Partner
04 / 06 2019

Ministry of Supply

Ministry of Supply partnered with Cappen to create the digital core of the Mercury Jacket — the world's first intelligent heated jacket. We developed the mobile app that gives users full control over temperature through touch and voice via Alexa, while embedding machine learning to adapt in real-time to personal preferences. The result is a wearable experience that goes beyond clothing — an ecosystem where performance, comfort, and technology converge.

Mobile AppAlexa SkillsiOS & Android
Launch Project ↗
IoT · Apparel 2019
05 / 06 2025

LeadEdu

Cappen partnered with LeadEdu to design and develop a new website with a clean, modern interface and improved UX — delivering a digital experience that reflects the brand's mission of driving business transformation through innovative, high-impact training.

WebsiteUX/UIWebflow Dev
Launch Project ↗
EdTech 2025
06 / 06 2021

NeonDoor

Neon Door is a mind-bending portal into the future of digital literature — where storytelling meets immersive interaction. Designed as a speculative fiction universe, it blends editorial structure with nonlinear exploration, layered scroll effects, ambient audio, and neon-drenched visuals. Recognized by Awwwards, FWA, and Muzli, it reimagines what a literary website can be: not just a page, but a place. The experience sparked global attention, increased author submissions, and became a reference point for the future of narrative UX and experimental publishing.

Website

Literature · 3D Awwwards · FWA · Muzli

name: Feature — grid
html:
What we ship.

Our ways to move fast. See our case studies to see how each pillar performs in the wild.

(01)

Branding that drives conversion & funding.

We clarify your positioning, define a distinctive tone of voice, and build a visual system that works across acquisition and product. Each sprint ships a robust logo, pragmatic brand guidelines, and a social kit so you can launch fast. The goal is simple: perceived value up.

(02)

Product experiences users adopt & keep using.

We start from business goals, map the critical journeys, and prototype what actually moves the needle. Every sprint ships clear flows, a reusable UI library, and a dev-ready handoff. Expect time-to-value down, UX friction down, retention/NPS up.

(03)

Web design for growing teams & business.

We align messaging, page architecture, and UI. You get clear structure and sections. The site loads fast, tells the right story, and pushes to action without dev firefighting. Your team gets a scalable base they can evolve without calling us for every change.

(04)

Investor-proof decks that raise faster.

We craft the narrative that gets meetings and a precise ask. Design serves the story: readable numbers, rhythm across slides, and versions for teaser / one-pager. Your deck can be pitched in 5 minutes, read solo, and generates faster responses.

name: FAQ — accordion (details)
html:
Frequently asked

How does the free trial work?

You get full access for 14 days. No credit card required. At the end of the trial you can pick a plan or your workspace freezes (we keep your data for 60 days).

Can I cancel any time?

Yes. Plans are month-to-month. Cancel from your dashboard and you'll keep access until the end of the current billing period.

Do you offer student discounts?

Yes — 50% off any plan with a valid .edu email. Send your details to students@studio.com and we'll set it up within a business day.

Is my data secure?

All data is encrypted at rest (AES-256) and in transit (TLS 1.3). We're SOC 2 Type II certified. Audit logs and SSO are available on the Team plan and above.

name: FAQ — two column
html:
FAQ

Questions, answered

Where is my data stored?

On EU-West servers in Frankfurt, Germany. We never replicate to the US.

Can I export my work?

Yes — full Markdown, JSON, and ZIP exports are available on every plan.

Do you have an API?

Yes. A REST API with bearer tokens is available on the Team plan and above.

How do refunds work?

30-day money-back, no questions asked. Email billing@studio.com.

name: FAQ — single column
html:
Common questions

How fast is shipping?
Most orders ship within 24 hours. Express orders before noon go out same-day from our Brooklyn warehouse.
Do you ship internationally?
Yes — to 60+ countries. Duties and import taxes are calculated at checkout.
What's your return policy?
Free returns within 30 days. Items must be unworn and in original packaging.
Can I change or cancel my order?
Within 2 hours of placing it, yes. After that, please email support@studio.com.

name: FAQ — narrow
html:
FAQ

2–5 business days in the US.

name: FAQ — categorized
html:
Help center

When do I get billed?

On the same calendar day each month as your initial signup. Annual plans are billed once on signup.

Can I switch plans?

Yes, any time. Upgrades are prorated to the day. Downgrades take effect at the next renewal.

Do you accept purchase orders?

Yes — for annual plans of $5,000+ and 12+ months. Email billing@studio.com.

name: FAQ — with contact CTA
html:
FAQ

Do you offer refunds?

Yes — 30-day money-back guarantee on all plans.

How do I delete my account?

Settings → Account → Delete. We erase all your data within 7 days.

Can I invite my team?

Yes, on the Team plan and above. Up to 50 seats included.

Is there a free plan?

Yes — the Personal plan is free forever for individual use.

Still have questions?

Our team replies in under 2 hours during business days.
